page_metadata.biotools__summary: Takes a set of sequences and does an all-against-all pairwise comparison of words (fragments of the sequences of a specified fixed size) in the sequences, finding regions of identity between any two sequences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Takes a set of sequences and does an all-against-all pairwise comparison of words (fragments of the sequences of a specified fixed size) in the sequences, finding regions of identity between any two sequences.
